name: launchpad
description: LaunchPad harness — 36 agents, 15 skills, and 38 commands for structured product development with compound learning. Commands prefixed /lp-* (e.g., /lp-commit, /lp-review, /lp-ship). Opinionated methodology: design-before-planning, compound learning loop, merge-prevention hook, 4 meta-orchestrators.
